description:
Log into Oscar EMR as Dr. Sarah Chen (oscardoc) and send an internal message to Dr. James Wilson. 

Login credentials:
- Username: oscardoc
- Password: oscar
- PIN: 1117

Message Details:
- Recipient: Dr. James Wilson
- Subject: 'Cardiology Referral Discussion - Margaret Thompson'
- Body: 'Dr. Wilson, I would like to discuss a cardiology referral for our patient Margaret Thompson. She presented today with exertional dyspnea and intermittent chest tightness over the past 3 weeks. ECG showed non-specific ST changes. Please let me know your earliest availability for a case review. Thank you, Dr. Chen'
